segments.text: So eating prasadam, it doesn't need any support. Simply by eating prasadam one can become completely
purified. Such, so powerful is that simple, that process of eating only. Why? Because
it's the mercy of the Lord. You are not eating ordinary things. You are eating Krishna's
mercy. You are hearing Krishna's mercy. You are seeing Krishna's mercy. Who is Krishna?
The Supreme Personality Godhead, the limitless Lord, limitless energies, omnipotent. Why?
Infinitely loving, limitlessly loving personality. Unlimitedly compassionate personality. You
see personality, Prabhupada you feel, when you say Prabhupada is compassionate, you feel
personality. The compassionate is. So Krishna, unlimited, limitlessly loving, loving, loving,
He is limitless compassion. His limitless compassion is his prasadam. Limitless compassion
is his. You should see that feeling of the Supreme Lord in prasadam. Krishna varadayamay
kumbha. You should see the Lord's mercy when the Holy Name descends. Sankirtana. You get
the opportunity to hear Sankirtana. We are not creating that sound. We are desiring to
hear Sankirtana. It is descending from the spiritual world, the sound. These are all
mysterious truths. The beautiful deities are descending. The Lord is assuming the form
of the deity. The original Lord, his original substance is assuming the form of the deities.
Because the Lord is giving us a limitless compassion for us. In our conditioned state,
he is giving us opportunity to lead life, personal life with him.
